scenarios.name: RFI coordination
scenarios.subject: RFI-042 Beam connection detail at Grid B4
scenarios.body: Please confirm whether Detail 5 on S-204 or Spec 05 12 00 governs the beam connection at Grid B4. Fabrication needs a response by tomorrow to avoid delay.
scenarios.notes: Shows RFI classification, drafting, and follow-up task creation.

scenarios.name: Delay notice
scenarios.subject: Notice of delay for raft foundation concrete pour
scenarios.body: Due to unplanned plant maintenance, tomorrow's C35/45 concrete delivery will slip by 24 hours. Please advise whether the pour sequence should be rescheduled.
scenarios.notes: Shows urgent delay handling and construction-specific response tone.

scenarios.name: Safety escalation
scenarios.subject: Stop work at Grid C7 due to exposed utility line
scenarios.body: A crew exposed an unidentified live utility line near Grid C7 during trenching. Stop work has been issued within the area until the line is isolated and cleared.
scenarios.notes: Shows urgent safety scenario and escalated acknowledgement.
